title: ocymastrum junceum
intro: Ocymastrum junceum, also known as Himalayan sweet cicely or sweet cicely, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and antispasmodic effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Ocymastrum junceum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and relieve symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Ocymastrum junceum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
